title: Lost to Shame
overview: A small time actor is given the lead role in a play dealing with homosexuality. Though he has always believed himself to be open minded, his little brother’s secret proves otherwise, and he realizes that he has been fooling himself the entire time.

trailers.title: Caught up in the Dark Life, the young Korean actor is… Lost to Shame now on GagaOOLala
